name: Bread Machine Bagels
recipeInstructions:
1. Place all ingredients in the bread machine and select the dough setting. When the cycle is complete, remove the dough from the pan (if not using a bread machine, knead the dough for about 5 minutes and let it rise in a warm place).
2. Place the dough on a lightly floured surface. Punch down and knead for 5-10 minutes until smooth. Divide into 5 equal pieces. From each piece, form a ball and make a hole using your thumbs. Stretch until smooth and the hole is about 1 inch in diameter. Place the bagels on a greased baking sheet and let them rise covered for 10 minutes.
3. Heat the oven to 400°F. In a large saucepan or skillet, bring 6 cups of water to a boil. Cook the bagels 2 at a time for 3 minutes, turning once.
4. Place the bagels on a greased baking sheet. Brush with beaten egg and sprinkle with favorite toppings. Bake at 400°F for 20-25 minutes until deep golden brown. Cool on a wire rack.
